channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17645] LBUG LustreError: 171387:0:(osc_page.c:182:osc_page_delete()) Trying to teardown failed: -16
item.description:
Client LBUG with 2.15.4 servers and clients. No vmcore but I wanted to report it anyway. We can provide more info if we see it again.

Looks a little bit similar to an old LBUG we reported and that was fixed in LU-12752, but here there is no ll_delete_inode() involved.

 

2024-03-14T14:08:41-07:00 sh03-12n04 kernel: LustreError: 171387:0:(osc_cache.c:2495:osc_teardown_async_page()) extent ffff9a0cea068348@{[292731 -> 292731/294911], [2|0|-|cache|wi|ffff9a0a504abe80], [28672|1|+|-|ffff9a115a38c5c0|4096|          (null)]} trunc at 292731.
2024-03-14T14:08:41-07:00 sh03-12n04 kernel: LustreError: 171387:0:(osc_cache.c:2495:osc_teardown_async_page()) ### extent: ffff9a0cea068348 ns: fir-OST0061-osc-ffff9a35f30a4000 lock: ffff9a115a38c5c0/0x1ece1cf07a09e85 lrc: 89/0,1 mode: PW/PW res: [0x1b40000402:0x2027d497:0x0].0x0 rrc: 2 type: EXT [0->18446744073709551615] (req 3590193152->3590197247) gid 0 flags: 0x800020000020000 nid: local remote: 0x6664ee3884f73f8f expref: -99 pid: 171387 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 1

item.summary: LBUG LustreError: 171387:0:(osc_page.c:182:osc_page_delete()) Trying to teardown failed: -16

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: still hitting this LBUG few times a day in racer.
